defects.evidence: run_carry_research uses carry_campaign_returns; run_carry_ledger never called; artifacts carry no ledger
metrics.funding_events = len(returns) bars; min_funding_events gate satisfied by 120 polls with 0 settlements
_stressed_total omits settlements= kwarg (legacy funding re-fabricated at 2x/3x); taker_fee_bps not multiplied
defects.summary: cost stress drops settlements and part of the cost stack

defects.evidence: observations_to_snapshot_records hardcodes data_source='real'; dataclasses.replace can relabel synthetic as real; no receipt verification
backfill perpetual_instrument_id='bybit:BTCUSDT'; ccxt collector uses 'BTC/USDT:USDT' and empty ids; same economic pair fails single-identity check
defects.summary: backfill and collector derive different identities

defects.evidence: settlement-only store raises 'dataset contains no quote observations'; no synchronized spot/mark/index history exists
trailing signal averages per-snapshot quoted rates; three 5-minute polls can substitute three 8h settlements
trading_scan_v5 H3 campaign runs only the bybit dataset; no spread, switching, transfer or counterparty costs
evaluate_carry_promotion recomputes PSR only; a campaign can promote without DSR or PBO
eligible scores mix sharpe_per_period (trading), USD/hour (mining) and annual yield (cash) in one ranking
opportunities rank loads JSON without schema, hash, lineage, freshness or evaluated_at verification
runner drops max_gross under allow_leverage silently; walk_forward_multi never mentions gross cap
evidence_sha256 hashes the record itself; verification only requires non-empty; failure_injected is an operator boolean
hashprice inline in YAML without source/freshness; ComputeQuote/InstanceSpecification carry no raw_sha256; KAS cell priced in USD/TH/day

policy: xfail(strict) markers are removed only when the fix lands; an unexpected pass fails the suite
